page_content:
Formerly: NUTR630.

NFSC631 Advanced Food Microbiology (3 Credits)

One lecture and one laboratory period a week. An in-depth understanding and working knowledge of a selected number of problem areas and contemporary topics in food microbiology.

Prerequisite: NFSC430.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
